## New Research

### ISSB March 2026 Update — Nature-related Disclosures
- "BEES" project officially renamed to **"Nature-related Disclosures"**
- Expands scope beyond biodiversity to all natural-related risks and opportunities
- Companion standard to IFRS S1/S2; aligned with TNFD, SASB, GRI, ESRS
- ISSB advancing toward consultation draft (next major milestone after IFRS S2 amendments)
- Source: https://www.sohu.com/a/1006527431_122014422 | Published: 2026-04-07

- South-Central Climate Resilience Forum: AR, KS, LA, OK, TX
